section.heading: Authorization of appropriations

content.p: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this part such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2005 through 2010.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 91–230, title VI, § 655, as added Pub. L. 108–446, title I, § 101, Dec. 3, 2004, 118 Stat. 2774.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 1455, Pub. L. 91–230, title VI, § 655, as added Pub. L. 105–17, title I, § 101, June 4, 1997, 111 Stat. 129, set out minimum State grant amounts, prior to the general amendment of subchapters I to IV of this chapter by Pub. L. 108–446.

A prior section 1456, Pub. L. 91–230, title VI, § 656, as added Pub. L. 105–17, title I, § 101, June 4, 1997, 111 Stat. 129, which authorized appropriations, was omitted in the general amendment of subchapters I to IV of this chapter by Pub. L. 108–446.
